name: Mushroom-Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the barley and 1 1/2 cups of water in a large saucepan or Dutch oven. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer until the barley is tender (20 to 30 minutes).
2. Meanwhile, melt margarine in a skillet. Add onions and sauté for about 5 minutes over medium heat. Add garlic, mushrooms, and salt. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until everything is very tender – about 10 to 12 minutes. Stir in soy sauce and sherry.
3. Add the sautéed ingredients with all their liquid to the cooked barley, along with the remaining 5 cups of water. Season generously with black pepper, and simmer partially covered for another 20 minutes over low heat. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed before serving.
